EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface MapServer

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

The MapServer component provides programmatic access to the contents of a map document on disk, and creates images of the map contents based on user requests. Designed for use in building map-based web services and web applications.

[Guid("C1EE7009-1027-4F5A-89AE-0E2CEC6FCEF4")]
public interface MapServer : IMapServer

IMapServer.ComputeDistance(string, IPoint, IPoint, esriUnits)

IMapServer.GetSQLSyntaxInfo(string, int)
